violations.description: SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): An inadequate amount of chlorine sanitizer was noted in the final rinse of the dish machine in the ware-washing area. The machine needed to be primed and it was found that the line leading to the pump was drawing some air likely from the connection between the hard plastic tube and the rubber pump tube. A temporary fix was found by adjusting the line however the manager called a repairman and scheduled for them to come out and find a permanent solution. Critical violation corrected through both the temporary fix and the manager immediately scheduling a more permanent repair.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Walls in the ware-washing area noted in need of cleaning.

CROSS CONTAMINATION (5 pts): Raw meat noted being stored above food not to be further cooked or not requiring the same final cooking temperature. Raw chislic was noted over mashed potatoes and coleslaw. Chislic was moved to the bottom rack to correct the violation.

SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): An inadequate amount of chlorine sanitizer was noted in the final rinse of the dish machine in the bar area. The sanitizer line had to be adjusted to allow the machine to prime properly. After adjusting the line in the jug to a new position (likely due to the low level in the jug) the machine was primed and subsequently was noted operating with the correct concentration of sanitizer. Critical violation corrected on the spot.

FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Clean plate shelving under black mesh mat food storage shelf under prep table (under black mesh mat) reach-in cooler interiors (coke and white cooler next to it) slicer pop gun nozzles and pop gun nozzle holders noted not properly maintained.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Walls in the kitchen next to swinging door to bar and in the ware-wash area noted in need of cleaning. Window track of the kitchen windows noted in need of cleaning.
